title: MCA Extends Deadlines for Name Reservation and E-Form Resubmissions
content:
# MCA Extends Deadlines for Name Reservation and E-Form Resubmissions

Ek important update hai for all companies and LLPs! The Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne name reservation validity aur e-form resubmission deadlines extend kiye hain. This decision comes in the wake of the fire incident at the MCA21 Data Centre on June 5, 2026, which caused significant disruptions to online services. This extension aims to provide relief to stakeholders facing compliance challenges.

Here are the key details from the Official Memorandum No. EGov-04/2/2021-e-Gov-MCA, Comp.No. 185122, dated June 22, 2026:

*   **Name Reservation Validity Extension:**
    *   **For names expiring between June 21, 2026, and June 30, 2026:** The validity has been *automatically extended* till July 10, 2026.
    *   **For names expired between June 5, 2026, and June 20, 2026:** Stakeholders can request an extension up to July 10, 2026, by raising a ticket with the MCA Helpdesk on or before June 30, 2026. Each request will be reviewed case-by-case after verifying name availability.

*   **E-Form Resubmission Deadline Extension:**
    *   **For e-forms with resubmission due dates between June 21, 2026, and June 30, 2026:** The validity period for these Service Request Numbers (SRNs) has been *automatically extended* till July 10, 2026.
    *   **For e-forms with resubmission deadlines between June 5, 2026, and June 20, 2026:** Stakeholders can request an extension up to July 10, 2026, by contacting the MCA Helpdesk before June 30, 2026.
    *   **For cancelled e-forms (due to non-resubmission during June 5 - June 20, 2026):** These may be reopened upon request through the MCA Helpdesk. After verification and approval, the concerned e-forms will be made available for resubmission until July 10, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the MCA Website for Official Updates](https://www.mca.gov.in/)

*Published on: 22 June 2026*
